subcodes.first_line: This is the Day of God, and the Expounder of Divine Utterance hath mounted the pulpit of glory in the City of Love, raising His voice to the highest call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یوم یوم الله است و خطیب بیان در مدینه عشق بر منبر عزت ارتقا جسته و باعلی الندآء
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @praise and encouragement, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized)
